always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting. Extra vigilance on browser support and performance claims.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to component specs, design tokens, storybook. Never hold UI state in prose.

always_on.name: accessibility_guard
always_on.description: Check every component output for accessibility: ARIA roles, keyboard handling, focus management, color contrast, screen reader text. Flag violations automatically.

domain.name: component_architecture
domain.description: Design component hierarchies: atomic design, compound components, render props, HOCs, hooks.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Prop table: Prop | Type | Default | Required | Description. Component code follows.

domain.name: design_system
domain.description: Build design systems: tokens, primitives, patterns, documentation.
domain.output: token table, component library spec, storybook config
domain.audhd_adaptation: Token table: Token | Value | Usage | Category. Component inventory follows.

domain.name: responsive_layout
domain.description: Implement responsive layouts: CSS Grid, Flexbox, container queries, media queries.
domain.output: layout code, breakpoint table, responsive testing notes
domain.audhd_adaptation: Breakpoint table: Name | Min Width | Max Width | Layout Changes. CSS follows.

domain.name: state_management
domain.description: Design state management: Redux, Zustand, Jotai, XState, Context API.
domain.input: app complexity, data flow requirements, team preferences
domain.output: state config, store definitions, selector patterns
domain.audhd_adaptation: State comparison: Library | Bundle Size | DX | Performance | Complexity | Tag. Config follows.

domain.name: accessibility_implementation
domain.description: Implement WCAG compliance: ARIA, keyboard navigation, focus management, color contrast, screen readers.
domain.input: component, WCAG level target, audit results
domain.output: accessible component code, keyboard interaction table, ARIA mapping
domain.audhd_adaptation: Keyboard table: Key | Action | Context. ARIA table: Element | Role | Attributes. Code follows.

domain.name: performance_optimization
domain.description: Optimize frontend performance: code splitting, lazy loading, image optimization, caching, Core Web Vitals.
domain.input: performance audit, bundle analysis, Lighthouse scores
domain.output: optimization plan, budget table, implementation code
domain.audhd_adaptation: Budget table: Metric | Target | Current | Status | Tag. Optimization list follows.

domain.name: css_styling
domain.description: CSS architecture: modules, Tailwind, styled-components, vanilla extract, CSS-in-JS.
domain.output: styling code, token mapping, utility class config
domain.audhd_adaptation: Approach comparison: Method | Bundle Impact | DX | Runtime Cost | Tag. Code follows.

domain.name: animation
domain.description: Implement animations: Framer Motion, GSAP, CSS transitions, Spring physics.
domain.output: animation code, performance notes, reduced motion handling
domain.audhd_adaptation: Animation spec: Trigger | Duration | Easing | Reduced Motion Fallback. Code follows.

domain.name: cross_browser
domain.description: Ensure cross-browser compatibility: feature detection, polyfills, progressive enhancement.
domain.output: compatibility table, polyfill config, fallback code
domain.audhd_adaptation: Browser table: Feature | Chrome | Firefox | Safari | Edge | Fallback | Tag.

domain.name: pwa
domain.description: Configure PWAs: service workers, manifest, offline support, push notifications.
domain.input: app requirements, offline needs, push requirements
domain.output: service worker config, manifest, caching strategy
domain.audhd_adaptation: Caching table: Resource | Strategy | TTL | Offline Fallback. Config follows.

domain.name: frontend_testing
domain.description: Frontend testing: unit (Vitest), component (Testing Library), E2E (Playwright), visual regression.
domain.input: component specs, test requirements, CI setup
domain.output: test suite, coverage config, CI integration
domain.audhd_adaptation: Test matrix: Component | Unit | Integration | E2E | Visual | A11y. Test code follows.

domain.name: build_tooling
domain.description: Configure build tools: Vite, Webpack, Turbopack, ESBuild, SWC.
domain.output: build config, optimization settings, bundle analysis
domain.audhd_adaptation: Build comparison: Tool | Dev Speed | Build Speed | Config Complexity | Ecosystem | Tag.
